results.title: Bedford's O'Connell relishing summer routine with Keene Swamp Bats
results.description: NASHUA — Aiden O’Connell has settled into a summer routine. The Bedford resident and pitcher starts once a week for the defending New England Collegiate Baseball League champion Keene Swamp Bats. On his off days, O’Connell does mobility training, throwing sessions and watches baseball with his teammates. “That’s really the best part,” said O’Connell, a lefty who pitched the Swamp Bats to a 2-1 ...

results.title: H.S. SPORTS: Tamaqua alum Erika Davis named to District 11 Hall of Fame
results.description: The PIAA Distrct 11 Hall of Fame class of 2026 was announced on Tuesday, and among the newest selections into the hall of fame is Tamaqua Area High School multi-sport athlete Erika (Barron) Davis. Davis, who now serves as the coach of the Tamaqua girls’ basketball team, participated in cross country, basketball, track and field, and volleyball during her time at Tamaqua. She finished her ...

results.title: Superb Spain beat France to reach World Cup final
results.description: Spain are through to the World Cup final after surprising favourites France with a convincing semi-final victory at Dallas Stadium.

results.title: Majestic Spain stun France to reach World Cup final
results.description: World Cup winners in 2010, Spain will now face either Argentina or England in Sunday's final in New Jersey.

results.title: Old foes savour World Cup semi-final showdown
results.description: England are one win away from their first World Cup final appearance in 60 years.

results.title: France's World Cup dream extinguished in chastening semi-final loss to Spain
results.description: Didier Deschamps' France were hot favourites to lift the famous golden trophy after a string of breathtaking attacking displays at the World Cup. But they met their match in the semi-finals when faced with slick European champions Spain, who outplayed and outsmarted Les Bleus to deny them a third consecutive final.
